typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	p_LadenSpeed_Kmph as integer (10),
	p_UnladenSpeed_Kmph as integer (20)
}
source(output(
		mve_gkey as long,
		Unit_Nbr as string,
		Facility_Id as string,
		Yard_Id as string,
		Carrier_Visit_Key as long,
		Event_Type_Id as string,
		Move_Kind as string,
		From_Location as string,
		To_Location as string,
		From_Position_Name as string,
		To_Position_Name as string,
		Carry_CHE_Operator_Id as string,
		Fetch_CHE_Operator_Id as string,
		Put_CHE_Operator_Id as string,
		Fetch_CHE_Id as long,
		Fetch_CHE_Kind as string,
		Carry_CHE_Id as long,
		Carry_CHE_Kind as string,
		Put_CHE_Id as long,
		Put_CHE_Kind as string,
		QC_CHE_Id as long,
		QC_CHE_Kind as string,
		t_carry_complete as timestamp,
		t_put as timestamp,
		t_fetch as timestamp,
		t_dispatch as timestamp,
		t_discharge as timestamp,
		t_carry_dispatch as timestamp,
		t_carry_fetch_ready as timestamp,
		t_carry_put_ready as timestamp,
		dist_carry as integer,
		dist_start as integer,
		Twin_Fetch as boolean,
		Twin_Carry as boolean,
		Twin_Put as boolean,
		Category_Id as string,
		Freight_Kind_Id as string,
		Restow_Reason as string,
		POW as string,
		ufv_gkey as long,
		Goods_And_Ctr_Wt_Kg as integer,
		Requires_Power_Flag as boolean,
		OOG_Flag as boolean,
		ATA as timestamp,
		ATD as timestamp,
		Rehandles as short,
		Year as integer,
		Month as integer,
		Week as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: true,
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'apmt-salalah',
	folderPath: 'silver/moves') ~> source1
aggregate1 window(over(Carry_CHE_Id),
	asc(t_carry_complete, true),
	startRowOffset: -1L,
	endRowOffset: -1L,
	Carry_CHE_Id_PREV = lag(Carry_CHE_Id),
		Event_Type_Id_PREV = lag(Event_Type_Id),
		t_carry_complete_PREV = lag(t_carry_complete),
		t_put_PREV = lag(t_put),
		t_fetch_PREV = lag(t_fetch)) ~> window1
join1 derive(Effective_Unladen_Distance = iif(
    isNull(dist_start)
    || toDouble(dist_start) <= 0,

    dist_start_AVG,

    toDouble(dist_start)
),
		Effective_Laden_Distance = iif(
    isNull(dist_carry)
    || toDouble(dist_carry) <= 0,

    dist_carry_AVG,

    toDouble(dist_carry)
)) ~> derivedColumn1
select3 alterRow(upsertIf(true())) ~> AlterRow1
derivedColumn2 aggregate(groupBy(mve_gkey),
	each(match(name!='mve_gkey'), $$ = first($$))) ~> aggregate1
source1 filter(equals(Carry_CHE_Kind,'ITV') && equals(isNull(Carry_CHE_Id),false()) && equals(isNull(t_carry_complete),false())) ~> filter1
window1 filter((Event_Type_Id=='UNIT_LOAD' || Event_Type_Id=='UNIT_DISCH')) ~> filter2
filter2 aggregate(groupBy(Carry_CHE_Id,
		move_date,
		Event_Type_Id),
	dist_carry_AVG = avg(dist_carry),
		dist_start_AVG = avg(dist_start)) ~> aggregate2
filter1 derive(move_date = toDate(t_put),
		dist_carry = iif(dist_carry==100000000,0,dist_carry),
		dist_start = iif(dist_start==100000000,0,dist_start)) ~> derivedColumn2
filter2, aggregate2 join(aggregate1@move_date == aggregate2@move_date
	&& aggregate1@Carry_CHE_Id == aggregate2@Carry_CHE_Id
	&& aggregate1@Event_Type_Id == aggregate2@Event_Type_Id,
	joinType:'left',
	matchType:'exact',
	ignoreSpaces: false,
	broadcast: 'auto')~> join1
derivedColumn1 derive(Estimated_Unladen_Travel_Sec = (Effective_Unladen_Distance / 1000.0) / $p_UnladenSpeed_Kmph * 3600,
		Estimated_Laden_Travel_Sec = (Effective_Laden_Distance / 1000.0)
/
$p_LadenSpeed_Kmph
* 3600) ~> derivedColumn3
select2 split(Event_Type_Id=="UNIT_LOAD",
	Event_Type_Id=="UNIT_DISCH",
	disjoint: true) ~> split1@(Load, Dsch)
derivedColumn3 select(mapColumn(
		mve_gkey,
		Unit_Nbr,
		Facility_Id,
		Yard_Id,
		Carrier_Visit_Key,
		Event_Type_Id = aggregate1@Event_Type_Id,
		Move_Kind,
		From_Location,
		To_Location,
		From_Position_Name,
		To_Position_Name,
		Carry_CHE_Operator_Id,
		Fetch_CHE_Operator_Id,
		Put_CHE_Operator_Id,
		Fetch_CHE_Id,
		Fetch_CHE_Kind,
		Carry_CHE_Id = aggregate1@Carry_CHE_Id,
		Carry_CHE_Kind,
		Put_CHE_Id,
		Put_CHE_Kind,
		QC_CHE_Id,
		QC_CHE_Kind,
		t_carry_complete,
		t_put,
		t_fetch,
		t_dispatch,
		t_discharge,
		t_carry_dispatch,
		t_carry_fetch_ready,
		t_carry_put_ready,
		dist_carry,
		dist_start,
		Twin_Fetch,
		Twin_Carry,
		Twin_Put,
		Category_Id,
		Freight_Kind_Id,
		Restow_Reason,
		POW,
		ufv_gkey,
		Goods_And_Ctr_Wt_Kg,
		Requires_Power_Flag,
		OOG_Flag,
		ATA,
		ATD,
		Rehandles,
		Year,
		Month,
		Week,
		move_date = aggregate1@move_date,
		Carry_CHE_Id_PREV,
		Event_Type_Id_PREV,
		t_carry_complete_PREV,
		t_put_PREV,
		t_fetch_PREV,
		dist_carry_AVG,
		dist_start_AVG,
		Effective_Unladen_Distance,
		Effective_Laden_Distance,
		Estimated_Unladen_Travel_Sec,
		Estimated_Laden_Travel_Sec
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> select2
split1@Load derive(Direct_RTG_Wait_Sec = iif(
    !isNull(t_carry_fetch_ready)
    && !isNull(t_fetch),

    (toLong(t_fetch) - toLong(t_carry_fetch_ready)) / 1000,

    toLong(null())
)) ~> derivedColumn4
split1@Dsch derive(Direct_RTG_Wait_Sec = iif(
    !isNull(t_carry_put_ready)
    && !isNull(t_put),

    (toLong(t_put) - toLong(t_carry_put_ready)) / 1000,

    toLong(null())
)) ~> derivedColumn5
derivedColumn5 derive(Fallback_Wait = iif(
    isNull(Direct_RTG_Wait_Sec)
    && !isNull(t_put)
    && !isNull(t_carry_dispatch),

    (
        (toLong(t_put) - toLong(t_carry_dispatch))/1000
    )
    -
    (
        Estimated_Unladen_Travel_Sec
        +
        Estimated_Laden_Travel_Sec
    ),

    toDouble(null())
)) ~> derivedColumn6
derivedColumn4 derive(Fallback_Wait = iif(
    isNull(Direct_RTG_Wait_Sec)
    && !isNull(t_fetch)
    && !isNull(t_carry_dispatch),

    (
        (toLong(t_fetch) - toLong(t_carry_dispatch))/1000
    )
    -
    (
        Estimated_Unladen_Travel_Sec
    ),

    toDouble(null())
)) ~> derivedColumn7
derivedColumn6 derive(prev_fallback = iif(
    isNull(Direct_RTG_Wait_Sec)
    && isNull(Fallback_Wait)
    && !isNull(t_carry_complete_PREV)
    && !isNull(t_put),

    (
        (toLong(t_put) - toLong(t_carry_complete_PREV))/1000
    )
    -
    (
        Estimated_Unladen_Travel_Sec
        +
        Estimated_Laden_Travel_Sec
    ),

    toDouble(null())
)) ~> derivedColumn8
derivedColumn7 derive(prev_fallback = iif(
    isNull(Direct_RTG_Wait_Sec)
    && isNull(Fallback_Wait)
    && !isNull(t_carry_complete_PREV)
    && !isNull(t_fetch),

    (
        (toLong(t_fetch) - toLong(t_carry_complete_PREV))/1000
    )
    -
    Estimated_Unladen_Travel_Sec,

    toDouble(null())
)) ~> derivedColumn9
derivedColumn9 derive(Wait_Time_Sec = coalesce(
    Direct_RTG_Wait_Sec,
    Fallback_Wait,
    prev_fallback
)) ~> derivedColumn10
derivedColumn8 derive(Wait_Time_Sec = coalesce(
    Direct_RTG_Wait_Sec,
    Fallback_Wait,
    prev_fallback
)) ~> derivedColumn11
derivedColumn10, derivedColumn11 union(byName: true)~> union2
union2 derive(Idle_Time_Sec = iif(
    !isNull(t_carry_complete_PREV)
    &&
    toLong(t_carry_dispatch) >= toLong(t_carry_complete_PREV),

    (
        toLong(t_carry_dispatch)
        -
        toLong(t_carry_complete_PREV)
    ) / 1000,

    toLong(null())
)) ~> derivedColumn12
derivedColumn12 derive(Wait_Time_Sec = iif(
    Wait_Time_Sec < 0
    || Wait_Time_Sec > 7200,

    toLong(0),

    toLong(Wait_Time_Sec)
),
		Idle_Time_Sec = iif(
    Idle_Time_Sec < 0
    || Idle_Time_Sec > 14400,

    toLong(0),

    toLong(Idle_Time_Sec)
)) ~> derivedColumn13
derivedColumn13 select(mapColumn(
		mve_gkey,
		Unit_Nbr,
		Facility_Id,
		Yard_Id,
		Carrier_Visit_Key,
		Event_Type_Id,
		Move_Kind,
		From_Location,
		To_Location,
		From_Position_Name,
		To_Position_Name,
		Carry_CHE_Operator_Id,
		Fetch_CHE_Operator_Id,
		Put_CHE_Operator_Id,
		Fetch_CHE_Id,
		Fetch_CHE_Kind,
		Carry_CHE_Id,
		Carry_CHE_Kind,
		Put_CHE_Id,
		Put_CHE_Kind,
		QC_CHE_Id,
		QC_CHE_Kind,
		t_carry_complete,
		t_put,
		t_fetch,
		t_dispatch,
		t_discharge,
		t_carry_dispatch,
		t_carry_fetch_ready,
		t_carry_put_ready,
		dist_carry,
		dist_start,
		Twin_Fetch,
		Twin_Carry,
		Twin_Put,
		Category_Id,
		Freight_Kind_Id,
		Restow_Reason,
		POW,
		ufv_gkey,
		Goods_And_Ctr_Wt_Kg,
		Requires_Power_Flag,
		OOG_Flag,
		ATA,
		ATD,
		Rehandles,
		Year,
		Month,
		Week,
		move_date,
		Carry_CHE_Id_PREV,
		Event_Type_Id_PREV,
		t_carry_complete_PREV,
		t_put_PREV,
		t_fetch_PREV,
		dist_carry_AVG,
		dist_start_AVG,
		Effective_Unladen_Distance,
		Effective_Laden_Distance,
		Estimated_Unladen_Travel_Sec,
		Estimated_Laden_Travel_Sec,
		Direct_RTG_Wait_Sec,
		Fallback_Wait,
		prev_fallback,
		Wait_Time_Sec,
		Idle_Time_Sec
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> select3
AlterRow1 sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		mve_gkey as string,
		Unit_Nbr as string,
		Facility_Id as string,
		Event_Type_Id as string,
		Move_Kind as string,
		t_carry_complete as timestamp,
		t_put as timestamp,
		t_fetch as timestamp,
		t_dispatch as timestamp,
		t_discharge as timestamp,
		t_carry_dispatch as timestamp,
		t_carry_fetch_ready as timestamp,
		t_carry_put_ready as timestamp,
		dist_carry as string,
		dist_start as string,
		PreviousJobCompletion as timestamp,
		DSCH_Laden_Duration_Sec as double,
		DSCH_UnLaden_Duration_Sec01 as double,
		DSCH_Cycle_Duration_Sec as double,
		Laden_Travel_Service_Sec as double,
		Load_Unladen_Duration_Sec as double,
		Load_Laden_Duration_Sec as double,
		Load_Cycle_Duration_Sec as double,
		Unladen_Travel_Service_Sec as double,
		Dsch_Unladen_Duration_Sec as double,
		Year as integer,
		Month as integer,
		Week as integer,
		Load_UnladenWait_ToLoad as double,
		Category_Id as string,
		Freight_Kind_Id as string,
		OOG_Flag as string,
		pow as string
	),
	format: 'delta',
	fileSystem: 'apmt-salalah',
	folderPath: 'gold/itv_wait_idle_time',
	mergeSchema: true,
	autoCompact: true,
	optimizedWrite: true,
	vacuum: 0,
	deletable: false,
	insertable: false,
	updateable: false,
	upsertable: true,
	keys:['mve_gkey'],
	umask: 0777,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	partitionBy('key',
		0,
		Year,
		Month,
		Week
	)) ~> ITVWaitTime
